content: Kubebuilder RBAC markers (//+kubebuilder:rbac:groups=...,resources=...,verbs=...) on the Reconciler generate least-privilege ClusterRole/Role manifests via controller-gen; best practice is one marker set per resource type actually touched, audited as the operator evolves, with CI checking generated manifests match markers (no drift). controller-runtime leader election needs RBAC on coordination.k8s.io leases (create/get/update) and is required for HA (multiple replica pods, one active reconciler) to avoid duplicate reconciliation races.
